case_title: NATIONAL CREDIT ACCEPATANCE, INC. VS. RAY PEREZ et al

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE BY MAIL ON MEMO OF COST FILED BY PETITIONER NATIONAL CREDIT ACCEPATANCE, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER NATIONAL CREDIT ACCEPATANCE, INC.'S PETITION TO CONFRIM ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER.
